retry_reason: kfree_skb is unconditional and always succeeds; retry would be a double-free bug.
contract_summary: This function releases the reference to the SKB by calling kfree_skb, which decrements the reference count and frees the SKB if the count reaches zero. It is called when a control TX packet has been processed. The caller must not access or reuse the skb after calling this function, as it becomes invalid.
